title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 5.4%.

items.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Assuming Streeting does resign and gets a contest I suspect his platform will be a lot more left-wing than many seem to realise. He knows who the electorate is.
items.content_text: Assuming Streeting does resign and gets a contest I suspect his platform will be a lot more left-wing than many seem to realise. He knows who the electorate is.

items.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: And frankly the the total farce of locking labour into "no tax increases for working people" and all that bollocks was not created in the ungovernable electorate but in Westminister.
items.content_text: And frankly the the total farce of locking labour into "no tax increases for working people" and all that bollocks was not created in the ungovernable electorate but in Westminister.
